SECURITY: new BILLING user May 30 STILL UNVERIFIED; 'unauthorized activity' banner still showing. (4) Yelp: session expired, RE-LOGIN NEEDED (stale since May 29) -- Joal emailed. (5) TripAdvisor: no ad email. (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.

toast.source: Parsed from Toast per-location Daily Performance Summary ('The Brewhouse Santa Barbara - 229 West Montecito Street - Thursday, June 4', no-reply@toasttab.com).
toast.note: Thu Jun 4 DETAILED per-location daily (229 W Montecito) parsed: Net $4,438.76 (+29.2% vs SDLW $3,435.85, -2.9% vs 4-wk avg $4,572.50), Gross $4,729.31 (+30.7% vs SDLW $3,618.10). 169 guests (+36.3% vs 124), 114 orders (+32.6% vs 86), 116 checks. Avg/guest $26.26, avg/order $38.94, avg/check $38.27. LABOR 32.2% of net ($1,428.87) -- still elevated, up from 18.4% SDLW (+75.0%) but improved from Tue Jun 2's 39.4%. Discounts $290.55 (+59.4% vs SDLW), voids $66.50, $0 refunds. Fri Jun 5 detailed daily not yet delivered at 7 AM run (only the Toast IQ Group teaser arrived); arrives midday.
